## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style (ktlint, detekt, spotless)
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] KDoc added for all new public APIs
- [ ] `docs/` updated where relevant
- [ ] No hard-coded strings (all UI strings in `strings.xml` / `strings-de.xml`)
- [ ] No `GlobalScope` or bare `!!` without invariant comment
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes reviewed by Architekt agent
